category-def.name: intelligence
category-def.label: SMART Intelligence Plug-in
category-def.description: The SMART Intelligence plug-in contains the choice of two intelligence modules that allows users to organize, maintain and query intelligence information. Intelligence information may have been gathered by earlier patrols, or may have been received from external sources. Intelligence information may be useful to Conservation Area managers when they plan future patrols.

category-def.name: planning
category-def.label: SMART Planning Plug-in
category-def.description: The SMART Planning plug-in contains a plan module that allows users to organize, maintain and query planning information. Plans allow for a set of targets (such as total distance patrolled or specific locations to visit) to be assigned to a patrol or series of patrols.

category-def.name: independentincident
category-def.label: SMART Independent Incident Plug-in
category-def.description: The SMART Independent Incident plug-in provides the ability to record observations (using the data model) that are not associated with a patrol (or any other data collection object within SMART).

category-def.name: entity
category-def.label: SMART Entity Tracking Plug-in
category-def.description: The SMART Entity Tracking plug-in provides the ability to record and track specific entities that move (such as individual animals) or fixed entities (such as a gate or bridge), record their attributes, and record observations associated with the entities.

category-def.name: ecologicalrecords
category-def.label: SMART Ecological Records Plug-in
category-def.description: The SMART Ecological Records (SMART-ER) plug-in extends the SMART capability to more scientific data collection and analysis of species, their habitats and disturbances. The Ecological Records plug-in is used for recording and analysing field survey data.

category-def.name: connect
category-def.label: SMART Connect
category-def.description: The SMART Connect plug-in allows SMART Desktop software to communicate and share data over the Internet with a SMART Connect Server.

category-def.name: cybertracker
category-def.label: SMART Cybertracker
category-def.description: The SMART CyberTracker (SMART-CT) plug-in provides compatibility with the CyberTracker application - which itself runs on a GPS-enabled handheld device. Using this plug-in, SMART users are able to create and deploy CyberTracker applications based on the Data Model or a Configurable Model (a simplified data model for the CyberTracker application). The plug-in also provides the ability to work directly with handheld devices while exporting/importing data, doing all of the interaction with CyberTracker in the background.

category-def.name: connectdq
category-def.label: SMART Connect Data Queue
category-def.description: The SMART Connect Data Queue plug-in allows SMART Desktop software to processes data files uploaded to a SMART Connect Server.

category-def.name: asset
category-def.label: SMART Field Sensors (Cameras etc) Plug-in
category-def.description: The SMART Field Sensor plug-in is designed to allow users to load data from sensors they have deployed to the field. The plug-in is built for generic sensors, but data loading is focused on camera traps. Users can configure the system to automatically read image metadata and generate observation data based on the information in the image.

category-def.name: profiles
category-def.label: SMART Profiles Plug-in
category-def.description: The SMART Profiles plug-in allows users to create a system in their Conservation Area for tracking a variety of items. The flexible design allows users to create their own definition of what they want to track and what attributes to collect for each item.(examples include offenders, animals, cases, cars, employees). The Profies plug-in allows the tracking of relationships, sightings and updates so you can build up a comprehensive understanding of the item being tracked, how they related to other items, and what is changing over time. This can be used as an Investigative Intelligence System, an Animal Population Tracking System, or any other applications that are developed.

category-def.name: events
category-def.label: SMART Triggers Plug-in
category-def.description: The SMART Triggers plug-in is designed to work with the Profiles plug-in. It allows users to automatically create new records in their Profiles system when particular types of observation data are imported into SMART. This allows users to automatically update their Profiles tracking system as soon as any relevant data is entered into SMART. Data that will trigger the system can come from any of the data inputs: patrol data, field sensors, independent incidents or ecological monitoring missions.

category-def.name: r
category-def.label: SMART R Scripts Plug-in
category-def.description: The SMART R Script plug-in supports the use of R within the SMART Desktop environment. R Scripts can be imported into and run from within SMART using the results from queries as parameters to the scripts.
